violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Fan blade covers for ventilation fans were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Facility is using the 2 compartment sink in the kitchen for washing dishes. Per initial inspection, the 3 compartment sink at the bar should be utilized for washing dishes. Food contact surfaces should be washed, rinsed and sanitized. -Due to ever expanding menu, recommended putting a 3 compartment sink in the kitchen and adding a wire rack above for drying dishes.
